name: AMRUT 2.0 Water Pitch Challenge
description: Scaling decentralized circular economy solutions for water management.
criticalEligibility: Technology must be capable of lab demonstration for scaling
Tranche-based disbursement: 5L (start), 7L (mid), 8L (final)
Specific focus on used water and urban flooding governance
Open to officially recognized Indian startups only

name: India-Pitch-Pilot-Scale-Startup Challenge (AMRUT 2.0)
description: Grant for water-secure cities addressing urban water, wastewater, and floods.
criticalEligibility: Must have a viable prototype ready for pilot-testing (No concept-only ideas)
DPIIT Recognition mandatory
Grant tranches tied strictly to Fund Utilisation Certificates at each milestone
Usage restricted to solution augmentation and city pilot costs

name: LIC HFL Social Trailblazer Program
description: Incubation partner program focused on social impact, MVP, and early-revenue startups.
criticalEligibility: Must possess valid NGO Darpan ID (NITI Aayog)
TBI must demonstrate a specialization in social impact ventures
Founding team must not have political or religious affiliations

name: Kotak BizLabs Accelerator (Velocity & IRP)
description: Implementation partnership with specialized TBIs to run growth-stage and investor readiness cohorts.
criticalEligibility: CSR-1 Registration (MCA SRN) is non-negotiable
Must hold valid 12A and 80G tax registrations
Minimum track record of handling high-value grant disbursements

name: D.E.S.I.G.N for BioE3 Challenge
description: Ideation challenge for sustainable biotechnological solutions in climate-resilient agriculture.
criticalEligibility: Strictly restricted to students (Classes VI–XII) enrolled in India
Video pitches must be original (No AI-generated visuals/narration)
Parental consent mandatory for participants under 18
Aligned with BioE3 policy pillars

name: BIRAC Biotechnology Ignition Grant (BIG)
description: Grant-in-aid to establish and validate proof-of-concept for innovative ideas in BioTech/AgriTech.
criticalEligibility: Must be incorporated in the last 3 years
Indian citizens must hold >51% ownership (OCI/PIO disqualified from this)
Must have functional R&D lab or be physically incubated in a recognized Incubator
Cannot be basic research; must have clear commercial prospects

name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
description: [Automated Source] Financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market entry, and commercialization.

name: BIRAC–Social Alpha Assistive Tech Quest
description: Joint programme to discover and scale innovations in assistive technologies for persons with disabilities.
criticalEligibility: Prototype must be at TRL 4 or higher
Lead applicant must be a DPIIT-recognized startup
Previous awardees of BIRAC-Social Alpha cannot apply

name: India-France AI Call
description: Joint call for proposals in Applied Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence between India and France.

name: SAMRIDH Scheme
description: Official SAMRIDH scheme guidelines for accelerator-led support and matched investment for startups.
criticalEligibility: Confirm that the current SAMRIDH intake accepts your accelerator or incubator as an implementation partner in this cycle.

name: BIRAC BioNEST
description: Bio Incubators Nurturing Entrepreneurship for Scaling Technologies — BIRAC's flagship bioincubation scheme.

name: Startup India SISFS
description: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme: financial assistance for proof of concept, prototype and market entry.

name: NEAT 3.0

name: Youth Co:Lab

criticalEligibility: Check whether the live Youth Co:Lab intake is open to incubators or accelerators, or only to youth-led ventures in the current round.

name: ADB Ventures
description: ADB Ventures supports climate and development-focused startups and works through ecosystem partnerships, pilots, and venture support across Asia and the Pacific.
criticalEligibility: Confirm that the live ADB Ventures intake or partner program accepts incubators, accelerators, or venture builders in the current cycle.

name: India Agritech Incubation Network
description: Gates Foundation-backed agritech incubation network supporting solutions for smallholder farmers.

name: StartupWave Virtual Incubation Platform
description: StartupWave is a virtual incubation platform connecting entrepreneurs with mentors, incubators, investors, and ecosystem programs.
criticalEligibility: Confirm whether the active StartupWave intake is open to incubators, accelerators, or other ecosystem partners in addition to startups.

name: UNIDO Global Cleantech Innovation Programme
description: UNIDO GCIP combines direct support for cleantech SMEs with the development and strengthening of cleantech innovation and entrepreneurship ecosystems.
criticalEligibility: Confirm whether the current GCIP country track or accelerator intake is open in the geography relevant to your incubator or venture.

name: IFC Startup Catalyst
description: IFC Startup Catalyst supports emerging-market venture ecosystems, including incubators, accelerators, seed funds, and startup support structures.
criticalEligibility: Primary access may be through accelerator, incubator, fund, or platform-level partnerships rather than a direct startup-style grant application.

name: Clean Energy International Incubation Centre (CEIIC)
description: CEIIC supports clean energy innovators through venture building, pilot enablement, mentorship, and market access.
criticalEligibility: Verify whether the current CEIIC intake is open to ecosystem partners alongside startups for the active call.

name: thingQbator

name: Krishi Mangal

name: Skoll Foundation Awards
description: Annual Skoll Award for Social Entrepreneurship recognizing and funding large-scale social entrepreneurs worldwide.

description: Flagship grant for early-stage biotech innovators to translate ideas into proof-of-concept.

description: Free 10-week summer accelerator offering prototyping funds for physical product concepts with dedicated tracks in ClimateTech and AgTech.

name: NIDHI-TBI
description: National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations — TBI grant for institutional incubators.
criticalEligibility: Applications are invited for establishing NIDHI-TBIs through DST call-for-proposals
Typically hosted by academic, technical, or management institutions
Startups apply to participating TBIs after incubator selection

name: NIDHI-EIR
description: Entrepreneur In Residence fellowship for innovators to work full-time on their startup idea.
criticalEligibility: Graduate students and innovators can apply through selected NIDHI-EIR Centres
Support is typically available for up to 12 months
Programme combines fellowship support with incubation and mentoring access

name: NIDHI Seed Support Program (NIDHI-SSP)
maxAward: Up to INR 100 lakh for startups
criticalEligibility: Incubators receive support in phased releases based on capability and need
Deserving startups may receive up to INR 100 lakh through incubator channels
Applications are accepted through periodic calls announced on the official portal
description: The NIDHI Seed Support Program (NIDHI-SSP) is designed to provide timely financial assistance to the incubators to support potential startups with promising ideas, innovations and technologies.

description: Seed stage and idea stage funding for Agri-startups, students, and agripreneurs under the RKVY-RAFTAAR scheme.
criticalEligibility: Agribusiness innovators should track the active MANAGE-CIA programme track and call details
Programme supports agriculture and allied sector ventures through staged incubation pathways
Applicants should use official MANAGE-CIA forms and cohort notices for the active intake

name: MANAGE-CIA Startup Agri-Business Incubation Program (SAIP)
criticalEligibility: Potential startups should already have a minimum viable product in agriculture or allied sectors
Funding is appraised against the business plan by the programme selection committee
Applicants are expected to commercialize and scale their product or service through incubation support
description: I'm convinced that about half of what separates the successful entrepreneurs from the non-successful ones is pure perseverance." Startup Agri-Business Incubation Program (SAIP) is a financial assistance program with maximum of ₹25.00 lakhs will be granted to potential startups that have a minimum viable product (MVP) based on innovative...

name: MANAGE-CIA Agripreneurship Orientation Program (AOP)
criticalEligibility: Applicants should propose one innovative agribusiness idea based on technology, process, service, or business platform
Applicants are expected to pursue the entrepreneurial opportunity full time
An initial business plan or proposal is required for selection
description: Agripreneurship orientation program is aimed at providing an opportunity to individuals to develop and validate their innovative ideas in Agribusiness sector by imparting one month mentoring cum hands on internship with other startups in Agriculture and allied sectors.

name: MANAGE-CIA Student Orientation Program (SOP)
criticalEligibility: Only students currently enrolled in a recognized degree programme are eligible
Applicants should propose one innovative agribusiness idea
An initial business plan or proposal is expected at the application stage
description: Student orientation program is aimed at providing an opportunity to college students to develop and validate their innovative ideas in Agribusiness sector by imparting one month mentoring cum hands on internship with other startups in Agriculture and allied sectors.

name: India Investment Grid (IIG) – CSR Opportunities Portal

criticalEligibility: Startup must be recognized under Startup Odisha
Qualifies through funding, patent, government sanction letter, or revenue-run-rate conditions
Support is available for one year under the monthly allowance policy

name: Startup Odisha – Product Development & Marketing Assistance
description: Financial assistance for product development and marketing/publicity for recognized Odisha startups.
criticalEligibility: Startup must be recognized under Startup Odisha
